comments.text: Related to the unpublished part of Furedi: Parsons proved that $f(n)=n+\lceil\sqrt{n}\rceil$ and $f(n)=n+\lceil\sqrt{n}\rceil+1$ both happen infinitely often; for resp. $n=q^2+1$ and $n=q^2$ where $q$ is q prime power. Wu et al. (WSZR14) proved the latter for $n=q^2-2.$ [Parsons75] [WSZR14] (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
